entries.title: Software Engineer
entries.summary: Commerce, auth, design systems, accessibility, and integration testing for HBO Max and Discovery+ web.

phases.title: HBO Max
bullets: Build and maintain commerce, subscription, and settings UI in a shared design system used across HBO Max web.
Own frontend work for global checkout and payment flows, including regional payment methods and vendor migrations.
Deliver auth, activation, and account flows across partner and multi-step journeys.
Apply accessibility as a default across auth and commerce surfaces — keyboard, focus, screen readers, and semantic markup.
Team SME for Playwright integration tests across subscription and playback paths.

phases.title: Discovery+
bullets: Improved accessibility across auth, profile, and redeem flows on an early tiger team.
Migrated account UI from legacy modals to a shared web component library.

entries.title: Development Specialist
entries.summary: Full-stack development on commercial React and React Native applications, internal tooling, UI/UX wireframes, and Power BI reporting for clients and operations.
highlights: Developed frontend of commercial React and React Native web and mobile applications.
Created internal React web application to upgrade from legacy system.
Designed UI/UX wireframes and prototypes to ensure products met clients’ requirements, functionality targets, and quality standards.
Produced Power BI reports and scripts to illustrate data for company and its clients to manage and monitor business processes.

entries.title: Tutor · Student-Athlete Academic Services

entries.summary: Graduate HCI program focused on user research, prototyping, and accessible product design.

entries.title: Bachelor of Science, Computer Science
entries.summary: Minor in Mathematics; concentration in Video Game Design & Development.

entries.title: UX/UI for Gaming

entries.title: Certified Accessible Player Experience Practitioner
entries.summary: Game accessibility certification focused on inclusive player experiences.
